mapper.select: select * from ODS_DWEQ_DM_ALARM_RULE_D where (deleted is null or deleted = 0) order by updated_on desc
select * from ODS_DWEQ_DM_ALARM_RULE_D where id = #{id} and (deleted is null or deleted = 0)
mapper.update: update ODS_DWEQ_DM_ALARM_RULE_D set rule_name = #{ruleName}, biz_type = #{bizType}, alarm_type = #{alarmType}, scope_type = #{scopeType}, scope_id = #{scopeId}, level = #{level}, threshold_value = #{thresholdValue}, threshold_value2 = #{thresholdValue2}, duration_seconds = #{durationSeconds}, enabled = #{enabled}, remark = #{remark}, deleted = #{deleted}, created_on = #{createdOn}, updated_on = #{updatedOn} where id = #{id}
